title: Adventure Or Not
description: A survival / adventure modpack with magic and a focus on world generation
body:
This modpack features a lot of **world generation** mods for an overhauld overworld. I created it for personal use. 


There are two main **magic** mods,
Botania and Spectrum.
Some mods focus on adventure and survival, like Hephaestus (Tinkers Construct) and the RPG Series Mods.
The pack also features a bunch of performance and QoL mods.

Some features might be unbalanced.

Beware: Hephaestus is very buggy.

# Additional Credits
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
